## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Security

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`backend/npm test`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`frontend/npm run build`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`frontend/npm run e2e`)
- [ ] ML evaluation passes (`ml-service/python evaluate.py`)

## Deployment impact

- [ ] No production impact
- [ ] Requires env var/secret updates
- [ ] Requires DB migration
- [ ] Requires infra changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated docs
- [ ] Kept sensitive data out of commit
- [ ] Added tests or explained why not needed
